indicators.name: large open atrium
indicators.rationale: The large open atrium lacks privacy and acoustic enclosure, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: high ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can contribute to noise and drafts, which are detrimental to sleep.

indicators.name: glass walls
indicators.rationale: Glass walls allow visual intrusion and lack the thermal mass needed for a comfortable sleep environment.

indicators.name: lack of furniture
indicators.rationale: No furniture such as a bed or chair would make it impossible to sleep in this space.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). The large open atrium, high ceilings, glass walls, and lack of furniture make it an unsuitable environment for sleep.
